hero.badge: The payment module for vibe coders
hero.title: Add crypto payments
hero.description: You're building with AI. You need payments. Just tell your agent "add Banksi" — it reads the MCP tools, installs the SDK, and wires up x402 paywalls. USDT & USDC on 5 chains, zero config.

quickstart.heading: Copy this. Paste to your AI.

terminal.promptLine1: npm install banksi and read https://banksi.vercel.app/api/docs to add crypto payments to my app.

quickstart.promptLine1: npm install banksi and read https://banksi.vercel.app/api/docs
quickstart.promptLine2: to add crypto payments to my app.

features.heading: Why Banksi?
features.subheading: The simplest way to add crypto payments to your AI-built app.
features.multiChainDesc: Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Tron, Solana — all supported out of the box. HD wallets generate unique addresses per payment.
features.secureDesc: createBanksiPaywall({ amount: 0.10 }) — that's the entire integration. Your API returns 402, clients pay on-chain, retry with receipt.
features.monitoringDesc: MCP server included. Your AI agent can read the SDK docs, generate integration code, and test it — without you writing a line.
features.x402Desc: HTTP 402 Payment Required, reimagined for crypto. Any endpoint becomes pay-per-use. AI agents handle the whole flow autonomously.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: From prompt to payments in 4 steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: "Add crypto payments with Banksi." Your AI agent calls get_integration_guide via MCP.
howItWorks.step2Desc: npm install banksi — the agent generates middleware code and wires it to your routes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Unpaid requests get a machine-readable 402 with chain, token, amount, and deposit address.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Send USDT/USDC to the address. Retry with X-Payment header. Access granted.

pricing.heading: Simple Pricing
pricing.subheading: No monthly fees. No setup costs. Just a small fee per successful payment.
pricing.feeDesc: Only charged on successful payments. Swept automatically during fund settlement.

forBanks.title: For API Builders
forBanks.item1: Paywall any endpoint with a single middleware function
forBanks.item2: x402 protocol returns machine-readable payment instructions
forBanks.item3: AI agents can pay your API autonomously via MCP
forBanks.item4: Configurable pricing per route — micropayments to subscriptions

forMerchants.title: For App Builders
forMerchants.item2: Network and token selection UI built in
forMerchants.item3: Real-time payment polling with confirmation callbacks
forMerchants.item4: Works with any Banksi instance — self-hosted or cloud

paymentPreview.heading: What Your Users See
paymentPreview.subheading: A clean, mobile-friendly payment flow. Select network, choose token, pay — done.

x402.heading: x402: Programmable Payments
x402.subheading: HTTP 402 Payment Required — reimagined for crypto. Any API can become pay-per-use with a single middleware.
x402.item1Desc: Protected endpoints return a machine-readable 402 response with payment instructions — chain, token, amount, and deposit address.
x402.item2Desc: Client sends stablecoin to the unique address. No accounts, no API keys — just a blockchain transaction.
x402.item3Desc: Retry the request with the payment receipt. The server verifies on-chain and returns the content.

mcp.heading: Your AI Agent Knows Banksi
mcp.subheading: The MCP server gives your AI agent everything it needs — SDK docs, code generation, integration testing. Just say "add payments" and it handles the rest.
mcp.tool1Desc: Full setup guide for Next.js / Express / React
mcp.tool3Desc: Complete SDK API docs for autonomous coding
mcp.tool4Desc: Test that Banksi is reachable and configured

cta.heading: Add payments in your next prompt.
cta.subheading: Install the SDK. Tell your AI agent to do the rest. USDT & USDC on 5 chains, no smart contracts.

testimonials.heading: Builders Ship Faster
testimonials.t1: I told Claude Code to add payments. It called the MCP server, installed the SDK, and wired up x402 in 3 minutes. I didn't write a line.
testimonials.t2: We needed micropayments for our API. Banksi's x402 middleware was literally one line. Our AI customers pay autonomously now.
testimonials.t3: The MCP integration tools are insane. My Cursor agent reads the SDK reference and generates perfect paywall code every time.

footer: The payment module for vibe coders.

demo.demoSubheading: A crypto-powered cafe built with Banksi. Browse the menu, checkout, and check the merchant dashboard.
demo.demoCard1Desc: Full cafe storefront with cart and crypto payment flow.
demo.demoCard2Desc: Banksi-hosted storefront with product catalog and direct payments.
demo.demoCard3Desc: Revenue charts, payment history, wallet config.
